name: Red Lobster Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first three ingredients until a sticky mixture forms.
2. Spoon the mixture into 12 well-greased muffin tins. Do not use paper liners.
3. Combine the last three ingredients and spread evenly over the raw batter in the muffin tins.
4. Bake for about 10-15 minutes at 450°F until nicely browned.
